mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling, short-rate discounting and recession fear ease, lifting equity valuations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average during FEDFUNDS downtrends, or if the sign of the relation flips in more than two consecutive 2-year rolling windows, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS level above 4.5 percent tightens financial conditions enough to compress risk appetite and raise recession odds, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not show negative average 20-day SPX returns, or if positive returns occur in more than 60 percent of FEDFUNDS above-threshold episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals deteriorating household income and weaker demand, which depresses equity earnings expectations and lowers S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-rise triggers are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more often than negative returns, or if the conditional mean return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point annualized.

mechanism_narrative: A broad decline in RSAFS and HOUST together identifies weakening final demand and residential activity, which should transmit into negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined negative-momentum condition in RSAFS and HOUST does not outperform each series alone, or if triggered months produce positive 20-day SPX returns in a majority of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO reflects improving industrial output and cyclical earnings leverage, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO uptrends fail to precede positive 60-day SPX returns on average, or if the sign is negative in any full rolling 3-year evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 is contracting and PAYEMS is weakening simultaneously, the economy is likely entering recession, and equity prices should fall over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDP-and-payroll deterioration does not predict negative 60-day SPX returns better than either series alone, or if the conditional hit rate for negative returns is below 55 percent.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST after a prior peak signals housing rollover and weaker wealth effects, which should reduce S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if housing-rollover triggers are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60 percent of cases, or if the conditional average return is not negative relative to baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is rising while FEDFUNDS remains low, real-rate compression supports multiples and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the next week; the effect weakens once policy tightens.
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI-FEDFUNDS interaction does not predict positive 5-day returns when inflation is rising and policy is accommodative, or if the sign turns negative after controlling for FEDFUNDS in rolling tests.
